title: Luffy Returns From the Mirror World
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Caesar Clown, Unknown person #12, Katakuri as The Straw Hats break through Big Mom’s encirclement as allies buy time and Luffy’s fight reaches its conclusion.
scene: Luffy escapes the mirror world while Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates help the crew break through Big Mom’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Shoot him!!! He's above the roof!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How dare you do that... to master Katakuri....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: going at that speed, you're just going to be shot full of holes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Adios, you good for no- thing....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shoot them down at the port!! They're head- ing your way!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hey, isn't the transponder snail saying something!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: At this rate, we'll definitely make it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'll all be fine if we just take away his ability to fly... Gyahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hullu u u u u u u u u u u u u u u u uhhhh!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't forgive anyone who lays a hand...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you understand!? Don't ever come back here!!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Finale storyline with 39 dialogue beats. The crew escapes Totto Land through the sacrifices and timing of Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates.
